narrative:
Toledo municipal court district has 173,085 registered voters, with 63.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.0 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +13.7% D−R vs +33.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
